caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied back and wearing black headphones sits in a studio setting. She is dressed in a black t-shirt featuring a white circular graphic on the chest. She sits before a professional black microphone on a boom arm. Behind her is a yellow wall and a black screen displaying the word "Johnson" in red text, with "Employee Only" appearing smaller in the upper right corner. Overlaid on the bottom of the scene is a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" in red and white text, accompanied by "PODCAST" and "Vol. 11 logo used." Across the sequence, the woman's facial expression shifts from a slight squint to a deeper grimace, with her eyes closing and her mouth tightening, suggesting an emotional reaction. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium shot of the subject as she reacts.
